title: Sword Art Online: UI
description: The system behind Sword Art Online, with the known UI from the show.
body:
![THE](https://i.imgur.com/HgPXYIZ.png)
![Swort Art Online](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/ca/Sword_Art_Online_anime_logo.svg/1280px-Sword_Art_Online_anime_logo.svg.png)
![MINECRAFT EXPERIENCE](https://i.imgur.com/ep7kie0.png)

This mod transforms Minecraft into a true Sword Art Online experience. The default inventory system is completely disabled (except in Creative Mode).

Instead, players interact with a custom SAO-inspired interface. Only the hotbar remains available, while inventory management, menus, and other systems are handled through the SAO UI, just like in the anime.

A full list of features can be found below. Be sure to check the images to see how the mod changes the look and feel of your game.

![Features](https://i.imgur.com/OIewKSg.png)
- Equipment, Items, Storage and (Skills - Coming Soon)
- Friends, Guilds and Partys
- Messages (Write to Friends, Guilds or Partys)

![COMING SOON](https://i.imgur.com/WG2jBxC.png)
- Compatability with EpicFight (For Skills)
- Compatability with CustomNPCs (For Quests)
- Compatability with JourneyMap (For the Map)
